answer:
Reducto is an agentic document platform for parsing, extracting, splitting, and editing files via API [1][2]. Access is self-serve; you can create an account and generate an API key directly in Reducto Studio [3][4].

While there is no recurring free tier, new users receive a one-time onboarding allotment of 15,000 credits [2]. Beyond this, pricing is usage-based at $0.015 per credit [1][2]. You can authenticate your API requests by setting your generated key as an environment variable [3][4].

```python
import os
from reducto import Reducto

# The client automatically reads from REDUCTO_API_KEY
client = Reducto()
file_ref = client.upload("document.pdf")
result = client.parse.run(file_ref)
```

Qualifying startups may be eligible for additional free credits for production workflows [5].
